name: Authentik
short_desc: Open-source Identity Provider for SSO, MFA, and access control.
author: goauthentik
description: Authentik is an open-source Identity Provider focused on flexibility and versatility. It supports OAuth2 / OIDC, SAML, LDAP, RADIUS, and SCIM, with a flow-based engine for authentication and authorization. Use it as the SSO front door for the rest of your bizeros apps. This package bundles the authentik server, worker, and a dedicated Postgres 18 database; no Redis is required for the bundled v2026.x release.

form_fields.label: Postgres Password
form_fields.hint: Auto-generated password for the bundled Postgres `authentik` role.

form_fields.label: Authentik Secret Key
form_fields.hint: Auto-generated Django SECRET_KEY used by authentik to sign session cookies and tokens. Rotating it logs every user out.
